last_packet.objective: Inspect the Python CLI and report the worker-related commands.
last_packet.scope: Inspect src/main.py and worker modules only when needed.
last_packet.branch_policy: Do not create or switch branches.
last_packet.reporting_contract: Report worker commands, changed files, verification results, and blockers.
last_packet.escalation_policy: Stop if Ollama is unavailable or a required tool fails repeatedly.
